thought.text: 我将查看 Task2 配置、源码结构和 README。

action.command:
sed -n '1,120p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/config.cmake; printf '
--- CMake ---
'; sed -n '1,180p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/CMakeLists.txt; printf '
--- antlr readme ---
'; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/README.md 2>/dev/null; printf '
--- bison par excerpt ---
'; sed -n '1,240p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/par.y; printf '
--- bison lex excerpt ---
'; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/lex.l

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -n '1,120p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/config.cmake; printf '\\n--- CMake ---\\n'; sed -n '1,180p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/CMakeLists.txt; printf '\\n--- antlr readme ---\\n'; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/README.md 2>/dev/null; printf '\\n--- bison par excerpt ---\\n'; sed -n '1,240p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/par.y; printf '\\n--- bison lex excerpt ---\\n'; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/bison/lex.l", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect task2 configuration and parser sources"}

summary: Inspect task2 configuration and parser sources
